# tw-animate-css Playground

> Interactive playground for tw-animate-css — a pure CSS animation library for Tailwind CSS v4.

## Project Overview

This is a Vite + Tailwind CSS v4 vanilla JS app that demos the [tw-animate-css](https://github.com/Wombosvideo/tw-animate-css) package. It provides an interactive UI to preview, combine, and experiment with CSS animations.

## Tech Stack

- Vite 7 (vanilla JS template)
- Tailwind CSS v4 (via @tailwindcss/vite plugin)
- tw-animate-css (pure CSS animation utilities)
- pnpm package manager

## Project Structure

- `index.html` — entry point
- `src/main.js` — app logic: animation builder, presets, card grid, replay controls
- `src/style.css` — Tailwind + tw-animate-css imports
- `vite.config.js` — Vite config with Tailwind plugin and dynamic base URL
- `.github/workflows/deploy.yml` — GitHub Pages deployment via GitHub Actions

## Features

- **Animation Builder**: toggle enter/exit direction, select multiple effects (fade, zoom, spin, blur, slide), preview combined result, see generated class string
- **Combo Presets**: common multi-effect combinations
- **All Animations**: individual animation cards with hover-to-replay
- **Controls**: duration (150–1000ms), easing (linear, in, out, in-out)

## Available Animation Effects

### Enter (use with `animate-in`)
fade-in, zoom-in, spin-in, blur-in, slide-in-from-top, slide-in-from-bottom, slide-in-from-left, slide-in-from-right

### Exit (use with `animate-out`)
fade-out, zoom-out, spin-out, blur-out, slide-out-to-top, slide-out-to-bottom, slide-out-to-left, slide-out-to-right

### Ready-to-Use
animate-accordion-down, animate-accordion-up, animate-collapsible-down, animate-collapsible-up, animate-caret-blink

### Modifiers
duration-{150,300,500,700,1000}, ease-{linear,in,out,in-out}

## Commands

- `pnpm dev` — start dev server
- `pnpm build` — production build to `dist/`
- `pnpm preview` — preview production build
